violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler/freezer door gaskets noted not in good repair. Cloth towel noted between open top coolers in the chicken breading area (inappropriate absorbent surface).
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hoods and filters noted not clean. Grease noted especially dripping under leading edging (opposite the filters).

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outside of rolling sugar bin and outside of drive-thru coke machine noted not clean. The coke machine has a large amount of buildup coming from the ice maker possibly.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage containers/dumpsters noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lids not shut)

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen and walk-in cooler under and around equipment and shelving noted in need of cleaning. Floor and wall around used towel bin/bag noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Chicken grill press and sauce buckets (wash rinse and sanitize every 4 hours) noted not properly maintained.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Box of food noted on the floor in walk-in freezer.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups noted being stored on the floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the walk-in freezer and around and under equipment in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outside flour/breading bin outside of sugar bin hanging yellow power cords and fan guards in the walk-in cooler noted not clean.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour/breading.
